column5: Goal for average booked package price
Average Bookings needed per month to reach booking goal

Note: This tool will assume a 20% booking rate unless you change it as 20% is generally a average estimate for organic traffic inquiries (that you book 1 out of 5 inquires you get). However, please note that this assumption will dramatically effect your end results, and if in reality, you book less than 1 out of 5 inquires you recieve, you may not see the return on traffic that this tool says you will.
Inquires needed per month to reach yearly booking goal
Website conversion rate (calculate this as the number of users divided by number of inquiries in a month)

Note: This tool will assume a 1% converison rate as 1% is generally a conservative estimate (that one out of 100 website visitors will inquire with you.  This is a very rough estimate, a normal range is between 0.5% and 2%, If your number is lower than .5% there are probably conversion issues with your website
Website visitors needed per month to reach your monthly inquiry goal
Organic users per month from one quality, SEO-optimized blog post
Note: This tool will assume a 50 users per month as a average estimate.  This is a very rough estimate, and you should adjust to your own user data.
Number of quality, SEO-optimized blog posts on your website
Organic unique user clicks per month from SEO
Compare to traffic goal per month
